meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, PG and Pensions, Deptt. of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Setting up of PMU for CPGRAMS with 3 resource persons for a period of one year
meta.deliverables: Quality analysis of Grievances (On Monthly Basis), Preparation of monthly reports, Data analysis, Any other work as assigned from time to time

content.full_text: This work order, dated 14th July 2022, is issued by the Ministry of Personnel, PG and Pensions, Deptt. of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances to the Quality Council of India. It approves the setting up of a Project Management Unit (PMU) for CPGRAMS with 3 resource persons for one year at a cost of Rs.65,52,000/- (excluding admissible taxes). The deliverables include monthly quality analysis of grievances, monthly report preparation, data analysis, and any other assigned work. Payment is structured in five milestones: 20% on award and commencement, 20% on finalization of monthly report format and submission of first 3 reports, 20% on submission of next 3 reports, 20% on submission of the following 3 reports, and 20% on submission of the final 3 reports. Advance payment follows GFR 2017 rules.
